import React, { useState, useMemo } from 'react'; import styles from './PricingPage.module.css'; import { MainLayout } from '../../layouts'; const basePlans = [ { key: 'free', name: 'Starter', tag: 'Free', monthly: 0, yearly: 0, desc: 'Perfect for individuals exploring the platform', features: [ 'Create profile & basic search', 'Apply to 5 jobs / month', 'Basic email notifications', 'Community access', ], cta: 'Get Started', outline: true, }, { key: 'pro', name: 'Professional', tag: 'Popular', monthly: 19, yearly: 15, // per month billed yearly desc: 'For active interpreters & recruiters', features: [ 'Unlimited applications', 'AI enhanced matching', 'Advanced filters', 'Priority email support', 'Export resumes / listings', ], cta: 'Upgrade Now', popular: true, }, { key: 'team', name: 'Team', tag: 'Growth', monthly: 49, yearly: 39, desc: 'Collaboration tools for small teams', features: [ 'Up to 10 team members', 'Team analytics dashboard', 'Shared candidate pools', 'Bulk messaging & scheduling', 'Role-based permissions', 'Priority in search results', ], cta: 'Start Team', }, { key: 'enterprise', name: 'Enterprise', tag: 'Custom', monthly: 129, yearly: 99, desc: 'Large scale hiring & compliance needs', features: [ 'Unlimited team members', 'Dedicated success manager', 'Custom integrations / SSO', 'Security & compliance reports', 'SLAs & uptime guarantees', 'Early feature access', ], cta: 'Contact Sales', }, ]; export default function PricingPage() { const [billing, setBilling] = useState('monthly'); const plans = useMemo(() => basePlans.map(p => ({ ...p, displayPrice: billing === 'monthly' ? p.monthly : p.yearly, yearlyDiscount: billing === 'yearly' && p.monthly && p.yearly ? Math.round((1 - (p.yearly / p.monthly)) * 100) : 0, })), [billing]); return (
Pricing Plans

Flexible pricing for every stage

Choose a plan that scales with you. Switch or cancel anytime. Yearly billing saves more.

{billing === 'yearly' && SAVE UP TO 25%}
{plans.map(plan => (
{plan.tag}

{plan.name}

{plan.displayPrice === 0 ? 'Free' : `$${plan.displayPrice}`} {plan.displayPrice !== 0 && / {billing === 'monthly' ? 'mo' : 'mo (yr)'}}

{plan.desc}

    {plan.features.map(f => (
  • ✓{f}
    • ))}
))}

AI signal ranking surfaces the most relevant jobs & interpreters faster.

Automation

Trust

Security

Enterprise plan adds SSO, audit logs, and compliance exports.

 ); }
